messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0149",
  "title": "Mahjong Wonders",
  "page_index": 88,
  "page_range": "88-90"
}

Section text:
Mahjong Wonders
麻将连连看  Nebula Studio6月上线 7月开投， 2025年麻将连连看赛道最强黑马，稳居美国桌面游戏免费榜前 10热门新品休闲益智手游营销观察
Source ：投放数据来自广大大 -广告主分析模块；投放受众数据为汇总数据仅供参考
Date Range ：2025/7~2025/1265+55-6445-5435-4425-3418-24游戏受众年龄分布
男性 女性 未知
菲律宾西班牙加拿大墨西哥意大利德国法国英国巴西美国投放国家 /地区TOP10
男性 31.3% 女性 68.0%受众性别分布0.0 K10.0 K20.0 K30.0 K
7/1 7/15 7/29 8/12 8/26 9/9 9/23 10/7 10/21 11/4 11/18 12/2 12/16 12/302025年广告主双端投放素材堆积图
iOS Android
88
穿绿色衣服的人在街道上AI生成的内容可能不正确 。
125万
展现估算9.2万
总人气值投放渠道：
素材数据： 竖版；720*1280 ；29s
素材特点：
这条素材使用一个剧情冲突极强的剧情作为开场，吸引用户
观看完整创意，随后跳转到游戏口播介绍。
该游戏受众主要为中老年用户和女性玩家，我们发现其素材
口播语速都很慢，同时 BGM选择也会更佳柔和。MapleStory : Idle RPG 2025优质在投创意
Source ：广大大 -广告主分析模块，选取时间段内新投放展现或热度表现较高素材展现
Date Range ：2025/7~2025/12点
击

材

视频, 79.5%图片, 14.5%各类型素材占比
广告主投放数据
产品首次投放： 2022年6月
双端累计去重后创意： 3.9万

message.content:
This section provides a marketing and audience analysis for the mobile game *Mahjong Wonders* (麻将连连看) and can answer retrieval questions regarding:
- **Topics & Entities:** Mobile game advertising strategy, audience targeting, and creative breakdown for *Mahjong Wonders* (Nebula Studio); references to iOS/Android platforms and the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) ad analytics platform.
- **Dates & Timelines:** Game launch (June 2025), ad campaign initiation (July 2025), data analysis window (July–December 2025), and initial ad deployment (June 2022).
- **Metrics & Demographics:** US market ranking (Top 10 free desktop games), audience gender split (68.0% female, 31.3% male), age distribution (skewing toward 45+), top 10 target countries (US, Brazil, UK, France, Germany, Italy, Mexico, Canada, Spain, Philippines), ad performance (1.25M estimated impressions, 92K total popularity), cumulative unique creatives (39K), and ad format distribution (79.5% video, 14.5% image).
- **Claims & Creative Procedures:** Identifies the title as the strongest 2025 dark horse in the Mahjong match-3 genre; details ad creative structure (high-conflict narrative opening → gameplay voiceover); specifies audience-tailored production adjustments (slow voiceover pace, soft BGM, vertical 720×1280 resolution, 29s duration).
- **Evidence Types & Visuals:** Relies on aggregated ad placement and audience data from 广大大; includes demographic charts (age, gender, geography), dual-platform ad material stacking timelines (iOS/Android, July–Dec 2025), and ad-type ratio breakdowns.
